removed.title: Confessions with Mother Goldblum
removed.description: Step into the Confession-Hole and tell Mother Goldblum everything. From sins to secrets, nothing is too strange. The Temple of Jeff offers no judgment, only vibes. Absolutely no Nick Cage followers, no exceptions.

removed.title: BitCorn Stalk Market
removed.description: Come bet the farm! Corntastic carnival games: Corn Hole, Barnyard Basketball & Corn Ring Toss. Win tickets, trade for corny prizes at the Bitcorn Stalk Market. Buy High, Sell Low! Be warned, it’s a volatile ecornomy… Iced Tea & Popcorn!

added.title: Mmm, Gruel...
added.description: We love the smell of oatmeal— err... GRUEL in the morning!

added.title: Monarch of the Moment
added.description: Be crowned king/queen *ad tempus*, have your portrait drawn, and enact new laws in the kingdom! (Subject to beheading, dethroning, or uprising by other means)

added.title: Knighting Ceremony
added.description: Our most cherished and beloved vessel hath been lost! Become a Knight Who Says Ni and hunt for our most Holy Chalice!

added.title: Shield Painting/Stained Glass
added.description: (Probably) guided crafting workshop! Make a shield to defend yourself from adversaries, or a totally authentic (or paper) stained glass art piece to adorn your humble abode.

added.title: Pickle Priest
added.description: Confess your sins, and our holy brine may atone you!

added.description: Electrolyte Elixir Bar: Are you hydrated? Didn’t think so. Come replenish your body chemicals with our proprietary health and mana potions

added.description: Bardic Open Mic: Minstrel and Songsmith Variety Show!

added.title: Medieval Foam Sword Play
added.description: Foam Sword play fighting with Master Godvonrav. Ever wanted to sword fight your friends? Come on by for a chance to pick up a foam sword, learn how to lunge and dodge, and duel for Otherworld sword fending Champion!

added.title: Spiced Cider/Mead
added.description: All natural, liquid inebriants, courtesy of our apple and/or bee friends.

added.description: Alchemy 101: Uncover the secret to transforming lead into gold, or childhood trauma into a dark sense of humor! Learn from our most qualified masters of medieval pseudoscience.

added.title: Herbal Reflections
added.description: An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.

added.title: Drunk History Presents
added.description: The Legend of Poncho Villa: Join Joe for some margaritas and his drunk rendition of the world’s most interesting Mexican revolutionary. (Mar garitas available until they’re gone)

added.title: Herbal Reflections
added.description: Herbal Reflections: An interactive herbal installation for self-guided plant meditation. Herbal inctures with plant cards and QR codes invite visitors to choose, taste, and tune inward to learn from each plant through reflection, writing, or drawing, shared or kept.

added.title: The 14th Anniversary Party
added.description: The 14th Anniversary Party: Bohemian style tea and cookies oasis is celebrating its 14th anniversary on Friday! Join us for a dance, cocktail (while quantaties last) or tea and homemade cookies.

added.title: Inflatable Costume Walk
added.description: Inflatable Costume Walk: Do you have an inflatable Unicorn or TRex or other inflatable costume gathering dust in your closet? Bring it and join us for a walk around Otherworld. All inflatable costumes welcome. Meet at Empress Camp at 6 pm. Route to be determined.

added.title: Oracle and tarot card reading
added.description: Oracle and tarot card reading: Bohemian style tea and cookies oasis, all ages and separate adults only space. Check our daily schedule board for oracle and tarot card readers.

added.title: Paint Boobies and Bodies
added.description: Paint Boobies and Bodies: Join Anne- Sophie and Vesna and receive body art and be beautifulier!

removed.title: DIY Pronoun Buttons
removed.description: Swing by to make a custom 1.25” pronoun button! We’ll have ze/zer, xe/xim, she/her, he/him, + they/them pre- printed pronouns (+ paper to make your own!). Add to a unique or shiny background, + voila! A pronoun pin as unique as you! Materials supplied

changes.name: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast

added.owner: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast
added.title: In the (soft,warm) Belly of the Beast
added.description: There is so much to explore at Otherworld, but sometimes you need a break - a moment of rest, to wait for something to call to you. Shelter in the (soft, warm) belly of the beast, swaddled, protected, and take a long breath.

added.title: Stick In The Mud
added.description: Get that stick in the mud and join us for a guided nature stroll through the rainforest with a seasoned naturalist and forager, discovering our magical flora and fauna and their traditional uses.

added.title: Psychik Nails
added.description: Psychik Nails: Lacquer up and listen in. The Moister Oyster Medium offers readings from beyond the veil while you get some extra sparkle and shine on your shelly bits.

added.title: Clam Bake
added.description: Celebrate 420 at the Pearl Palace with a gaggle of messy mollusks

added.title: High Tide Sunset Party
added.description: High Tide Sunset Party: The playa is dry. We are NOT. Come get shucked up at Nauticlub & The Snail Bar, we’ll be slinging moist tunes, Bloody Clamidias and Slug Bites until the tide rolls out. Follow the snail trail

added.title: Clam Bake
added.description: Clam Bake: Celebrate 420 at the Pearl Palace with a gaggle of messy mollusks

added.title: Corndog Variety Hour
added.description: Got talent? We don’t. But we’ll fake it til we make it and hope you’re none the wiser.

added.title: Clam Bake
added.description: Celebrate 420 at the Pearl Palace with a gaggle of messy mollusks

added.title: Heartivism
added.description: Gathering to share new words and innovate more new words with possibility to make art currency and signs/ sigils for love based magic

added.title: Dancin’ Dan will facilitate at Under The Mother Tree Main Space
added.description: Expressive Embodiment Shake Down!: Step out of the mind and into the body. Through playful movement, improvisational games, and connection with self and others, awaken creativity, presence, and authentic expression. Leave feeling alive, grounded, free, and connected.

added.title: Button IT!
added.description: Make your very own custom button to take with you or trade to remember Other World 2026.

added.title: Healing Hugs from Shaark the Hug Dealer
added.description: Healing Hugs from Shaark the Hug Dealer: Healing Hugs with a prescription for a refill.

added.title: Heartivism - love based culture and language cocreating
added.description: Come share language play and make up new words for emergent culture and make art signs too

added.title: ZenThai Shiatsu Partner Massage
added.description: Root into presence, connection and touch beneath the canopy for a guided fusion of Thai massage, Zen Shiatsu & Osteothai. No exp needed. Arrive with clean feet, clothes on, and an open heart.

added.title: World Tree Within - Alchemy Dance
added.description: World Tree Within - Alchemy Dance: Join us to dance and breathe into your inner world tree - with breath, movement, energy arts & sound - we dance to heal. Within our central axis ,we can anchor in our pillar of light, Above & Below- harmonizing and centering into Sacred Union within.

added.title: Qi Gong
added.description: Qi Gong: “Calm Creative Mindful Movement”: Awaken connecting conscious movement with breath through guided meditation; conjuring colours through correlated Kundalini chakras to clear, charge, and catalyze your core self cocreating our Otherworld. *Barefoot optional* Come curious, leave clear.

added.title: Dance-formative Ecstatic Journey
added.description: Dance-formative Ecstatic Journey: A gently guided morning ecstatic dance from womb to transformation, w/ DJ Spruce Lee:

added.title: Journey through the Subconscious
added.description: Journey through the Subconscious: Come join for a fun minds-eye visualization journey, decoding symbolism that can reveal insite within the deeper layers of your psyche. Bring a journal if you’d like to write it down to reflect on it later.

added.title: Somatic Relational Grounding
added.description: An opportunity to learn, embody and practice somatic regulation tools that support us to ground into our body and relational awareness. We will journey with our body temple and nervous system in a profound way that will continue to ripple out.

added.title: Weaving the Relational Web
added.description: Step into a playful space for real human connection. Expect laughter, curiosity, and just the right amount of emotional moisture to add a little extra magic to your festival.

added.title: Temple Touch
added.description: Temple Touch: Ritual of the Senses: Temple Touch is a guided healing ritual awakening the body through the five senses—touch, scent, sound, sight, and taste—inviting deeper connection with yourself while honoring another through the art of devotional giving and receiving.

added.title: The art of asking and receiving
added.description: In groups of 4, each person gets 25 minutes to ask for what they want—touch, play, music, or stillness. Others respond with consent or adaptation. A practice in honest asking, boundaries, and meaningful connection.

added.title: Ecstatic Dance Heart Journey
added.description: Arise & Awaken into your Heart with TranscendDance Hybrid-DJ Duo Power Couple offering diverse music genres/tempos to freely express through dance without words. An inner & outer journey of heart reverence for self, community, land & spirit.

added.title: Ground & Shine ~ yoga, meditation & movement
added.description: Sit, breathe and move gently in community. An intentional 60-minute practice to reconnect with yourself.

added.title: Acoustic Jam
added.description: Bring your instruments to Under the Mother Tree for a facilitated acoustic music jam, everyone gets a chance to lead!

added.title: Qi Gong
added.description: “Calm Creative Mindful Movement”: Root, restore, and re- energize through calm, conscious movement, breath, and guided meditation—channeling color through correlated Kundalini chakras to clear, calm, and center your core. *Barefoot optional* Leave light, in flow.

added.title: Orcar’s First Breach
added.description: Orcar’s First Breach: Come meet Orcar! Crack open the weekend with a toast and your best whale sound at the Orcar home base before our pod rolls out to play.

added.title: Nevermore shepperds Bazaar lounge.
added.description: Nevermore shepperds Bazaar lounge.: Nevermore Shepherds Lounge is a wandering ritual space of tea, coffee, puppets, and story. A living lounge where strangers become presences—invited to slow down, connect, and co-create through play, symbols, and shared moments.

added.title: Flair Stitch Project
added.description: Crochet Circle: All skill levels welcome. Learn some basic stitches, make a granny square for our community quilt with our provided materials, or bring your own project and hang out in a chill space.

added.title: The Flair Stitch Project
added.description: The Flair Stitch Project: Crochet Circle: All skill levels welcome. Learn some basic stitches, make a granny square for our community quilt with our provided materials, or bring your own project and hang out in a chill space.

removed.title: Brews and Brawls
removed.description: Grab a drink and watch our fighters clash! Cheer on your favourites while you lounge.

added.title: The Head Space
added.description: The Head Space: Guillotine talks: Words on uprising, praxis/hope 4 a better tomorrow. Fighting for Forest & Climate. Matriarchy: systemic change & care. Trust Issues: Media lit, surviving Info-Apocalypse. Protect Yo Neck: Data retention/ Privacy, Cyber hygiene. Radical Joy

added.title: Maji’s Magical Underground
added.description: Anarchist enchanters! Rebel witches! Join Maji, a dancing clown-mage and a leader from the Soft Resistance, for some group spellmaking, networking, and playful talk about forming the magical underground

added.title: Radical Street Art
added.description: A revolutionary arts & crafts workshop feat. DIY screenprinting, button-making, stencils and graffiti art. Make art for the resistance and enjoy the Molotov cocktail bar!
